description: Patient demographic data items from NAACCR Standards

items.name: Date of Birth
items.description: Patient's date of birth in YYYYMMDD format
items.valid_codes: YYYYMMDD format, use 99 for unknown day/month

items.name: Age at Diagnosis
items.description: Age in complete years at time of diagnosis

items.name: Race 1
items.valid_codes: 01=White, 02=Black, 03=American Indian/Alaska Native, 04=Chinese, 05=Japanese, 06=Filipino, 07=Hawaiian, 08=Korean, 10=Vietnamese, 11=Laotian, 12=Hmong, 13=Kampuchean, 14=Thai, 15=Asian Indian/Pakistani, 16=Asian Other, 17=Pacific Islander NOS, 20=Micronesian, 21=Chamorran, 22=Guamanian NOS, 25=Polynesian NOS, 26=Tahitian, 27=Samoan, 28=Tongan, 30=Melanesian NOS, 31=Fiji Islander, 32=New Guinean, 96=Other Asian, 97=Pacific Islander NOS, 98=Other, 99=Unknown

items.name: Spanish/Hispanic Origin
items.description: Whether the patient is of Spanish/Hispanic origin
items.valid_codes: 0=Non-Spanish/Non-Hispanic, 1=Mexican, 2=Puerto Rican, 3=Cuban, 4=South/Central American, 5=Other Spanish/Hispanic, 6=Spanish NOS, 7=Spanish surname only, 8=Dominican Republic, 9=Unknown
